name: Atmospheric Sniffer Integration and Vertical Profile Mission
description: You are an Atmospheric Scientist integrating a custom Methane (CH4) laser sniffer onto an ArduCopter. Using the payload integration brief located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/payload_integration_brief.txt, configure the 6 required ArduPilot parameters for sensor functionality and mission requirements. Create a vertical profile mission including a Takeoff, a DO_CHANGE_SPEED command set to 1.0 m/s, a high-altitude Waypoint, and an RTL command as specified in the brief. Save the completed mission to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/vertical_profile.plan. All parameters must be configured and the flight plan saved prior to any flight operations.
